name: Nia
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Rock Concert
uniqueTraits.text: If all 3 Quartzlings are on the battlefield when Nia activates, she may make a bonus action that activation.

ultimate.name: Geode
ultimate.text: Plot phase only. Choose a Quartzling that is the only model in its hex and is adjacent to an objective hex, and replace it with an objective hex. If it is within 2 hexes of Nia, she may make a claim action on that hex.

plotSkills.name: Crystal Mirror
plotSkills.text: Choose a boon on any model within range. Then choose a friendly model within range to gain that boon.

clashSkills.name: Crystal Glare
clashSkills.text: Choose a blight on any model within range. Then choose an enemy model within range to gain that blight.

traits.name: Rock Formation
traits.text: When Nia's banner is removed from the battlefield, the Quartzlings may immediately make a recruit action, even if it is the end phase.

plotSkills.name: Calcify
plotSkills.text: If this Quartzling is the only model in its hex and is adjacent to an objective hex, replace it with an objective hex.

plotSkills.name: Shimmer
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Rolling Stones
clashSkills.text: Each Quartzling may move up to 3 hexes in a straight line.
